name: python3-zstandard
title: python3-zstandard
summary: Python bindings for interfacing with Zstandard library
description:
Python bindings for interfacing with Zstandard library
This project provides Python bindings for interfacing with the Zstandard
compression library. A C extension and CFFI interface are provided.
.
The primary goal of the project is to provide a rich interface to the
underlying C API through a Pythonic interface while not sacrificing
performance. This means exposing most of the features and flexibility of
the C API while not sacrificing usability or safety that Python provides.
.
Zstandard, or zstd as short version, is a fast lossless compression
algorithm, targeting real-time compression scenarios at zlib-level
and better compression ratios.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-zstandard because Python bindings for interfacing with Zstandard library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-zstandard as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-zstandard with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-zstandard --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
